'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=l2UMk8Lh7a3P.eLWpgsIT7z3g.sg.cXzMrlIHSogWRk-1772849400-1.0.1.1-LF_msMgzwom7X5O6wu1NKZTDzdo0PiFp09AeV88dqKo"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
